info.title: Paper Scanner API
info.description: Generated OpenAPI document for the Rust API.

get.summary: List all announcements for admin management.
List invite codes.
List managed runtime settings.
List scheduled tasks.
Read durable scheduler cursor, worker heartbeat, and run status.
Return dashboard statistics.
List all users with admin dashboard counts.

delete.summary: Delete a user and associated data.

get.summary: List enabled announcements from the existing auth database.
get.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state containing storage paths.

# Returns

JSON announcement list ordered like the Python API.

get.summary: List articles with filters, FTS, and cursor pagination.
get.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.
* `headers` - Request headers.
* `raw_query` - Raw query string so repeated fields remain available.

# Returns

Paginated articles.

parameters.name: db
parameters.description: Database name or filename under data/index.

parameters.name: include_total
parameters.description: Whether to include total row count.

get.summary: Return one article record.
get.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.
* `headers` - Request headers.
* `article_id` - Article identifier.
* `query` - Database selector.

# Returns

Article record.

get.summary: Return access actions for one article.
get.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.
* `headers` - Request headers.
* `article_id` - Article identifier.
* `query` - Database selector.

# Returns

Article access response.

get.summary: Redirect to an article full-text target.
get.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.
* `headers` - Request headers.
* `article_id` - Article identifier.
* `query` - Database selector.

# Returns

Temporary redirect response.

307.description: Temporary redirect to a full-text target.

post.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.
* `headers` - Request headers.
* `body` - Password change request.

# Returns

OK response.

get.summary: Get the invite code generated by the current user.

Invite code response or null.

post.description:

Invite code response.

get.summary: Return whether registration requires an invite code.
get.description:

* `state` - Shared API state.

Invite requirement response.

post.summary: Authenticate a user and set a session cookie.
post.description:

* `state` - Shared API state.

Login response without the raw token.

post.summary: Logout the current session token and clear the browser cookie.
post.description:

* `state` - Shared API state.

Logout response.

get.summary: Return the current authenticated user.
get.description:

Current user response.

post.description:

* `state` - Shared API state.

Created user response.

get.summary: List active access tokens for the current user.
get.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.

# Returns

Active token metadata.

post.summary: Create an access token for the current user.
post.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.
* `headers` - Request headers.
* `body` - Token creation request.

# Returns

Created token response.

delete.summary: Delete an access token by row id.
delete.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.
* `headers` - Request headers.
* `token_id` - Token row identifier.

# Returns

OK response.

post.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.
* `headers` - Request headers.
* `body` - Polling parameters.

# Returns

Polling result and safe session status.

# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.
* `headers` - Request headers.

# Returns

QR login challenge and safe session status.

get.summary: Return the current user's CNKI session status.
get.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.
* `headers` - Request headers.

# Returns

Safe CNKI session status.

delete.summary: Clear the current user's CNKI session.
delete.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - Shared API state.
* `headers` - Request headers.

# Returns

Empty safe CNKI session status.

get.summary: Check which folders contain an article.

post.summary: Batch check which folders contain articles.

get.summary: List all folders for the authenticated user.
List favorited articles in a folder.

post.summary: Add one favorite to a folder.
Bulk add favorites to a folder.
Bulk remove favorites from a folder.

delete.summary: Remove one favorite from a folder.

get.summary: Get the favorite count for a folder.
Export one folder's favorites in a citation format.
Get the current tracking folder for the user.

put.summary: Set a folder as the current tracking folder.

get.summary: Return the public health status payload.
get.description:
# Returns

JSON health response.

get.summary: Return whether at least one scheduler worker has a recent persisted heartbeat.
get.description:
# Arguments

* `state` - API state containing the shared scheduler database path.

# Returns

HTTP 200 for a healthy worker or 503 when no healthy heartbeat exists.

200.description: A scheduler worker heartbeat is healthy.

503.description: No scheduler worker heartbeat is healthy.

get.summary: List issues with filters and offset pagination.
get.description:

Paginated issues.

get.summary: Get the user's notification settings.

put.summary: Create or update the user's notification settings.

favorite_count.description: Number of favorites owned by the user.

folder_count.description: Number of folders owned by the user.

is_admin.description: Whether the user has admin privileges.

AnnouncementInfo.description: Public announcement payload returned by the API.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp as a Unix epoch float.

enabled.description: Whether the announcement is visible to public clients.

priority.description: Priority label used for display ordering.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp as a Unix epoch float.

ArticleId.description: Article identifier stored internally as a SQLite integer.

CnkiLoginPollRequest.description: Zhejiang Library QR login polling parameters.

CnkiLoginPollResponse.description: Zhejiang Library QR login polling response.

CnkiLoginStartResponse.description: Zhejiang Library QR login challenge response.

CnkiSessionStatusResponse.description: Safe per-user Zhejiang Library CNKI session status.

configured.description: Whether a session-like row is configured.

cookie_names.description: Stored cookie names without cookie values.

has_bff_user_token.description: Whether a BFF user token is present.

FavoriteArticleRef.description: Favorite article reference used by bulk operations.

FavoriteArticleResponse.description: Favorite row enriched with optional article metadata.

in_press.description: In-press flag from the index database.

issue_id.description: Issue identifier from the index database.

oneOf.description: Journal identifier from the index database.

open_access.description: Open-access flag from the index database.

title.description: Article title from the index database.

FavoriteBulkAddResult.description: Bulk add response preserving the existing `added` key.

FavoriteCheckResponse.description: Favorite membership row returned by check endpoints.

folder_id.description: Tracking folder identifier, or null when none is configured.

folder_name.description: Tracking folder display name, or null when none is configured.

is_tracking.description: Whether the folder should become the user's tracking folder.

article_count.description: Number of favorite rows in the folder.

is_tracking.description: Whether the folder receives tracking pushes.

HealthResponse.description: Health check payload returned by the API.

error.description: Whether the database failed to read.

used.description: Whether the invite code has been consumed.

bootstrap_required.description: Whether a local administrator bootstrap must run before invites can be issued.

required.description: Whether registration requires an invite code.

JournalId.description: Journal identifier stored internally as a SQLite integer.

JournalRecord.description: Journal record with optional CSV metadata.

LoginResponse.description: Login response that intentionally omits the raw session token.

ManualWeeklyPushStatus.description: Manual weekly push job status payload.

finished_at.description: Unix timestamp when the job finished.

pushed.description: Number of pushed or tracking-folder-synced articles.

started_at.description: Unix timestamp when the job started.

total_candidates.description: Number of candidate articles considered by AI selection.

ai_api_key_mask.description: Fixed non-secret mask when a primary AI API key is configured.

ai_backup_api_key_mask.description: Fixed non-secret mask when a backup AI API key is configured.

has_ai_api_key.description: Whether a primary AI API key is configured.

has_ai_backup_api_key.description: Whether a backup AI API key is configured.

has_pushplus_token.description: Whether a PushPlus token is configured.

pushplus_token_mask.description: Fixed non-secret mask when a PushPlus token is configured.

sync_to_tracking_folder.description: Whether PushPlus delivery also syncs to the tracking folder.

ai_api_key.description: Primary AI API key update: omitted preserves, null clears, and non-empty replaces.

ai_backup_api_key.description: Backup AI API key update: omitted preserves, null clears, and non-empty replaces.

pushplus_token.description: PushPlus token update: omitted preserves, null clears, and non-empty replaces.

sync_to_tracking_folder.description: Whether PushPlus delivery also syncs to the tracking folder.

next_cursor.description: Keyset cursor for the next page.

invite_code.description: Invite code text required for every public registration.

masked_value.description: Human-readable prefix mask that never contains the complete secret.

reference.description: Opaque authenticated reference accepted by a pool removal update.

RuntimeSecretPoolUpdate.description: Additions and removals applied to one secret runtime pool.

add.description: New plaintext entries to normalize and append.

has_value.description: Whether a credential value is configured.

masked_value.description: Fixed non-secret mask when a credential value is configured.

secret_items.description: Individually manageable masked entries for a secret pool.

secret_pool_updates.description: Incremental secret-pool mutations keyed by API field name.

values.description: Values keyed by API field name; null clears and a blank secret preserves.

ScheduledDeliveryJob.description: Arguments accepted by a notification or push scheduled job.

max_candidates.description: Optional upper bound for recommendation candidates.

ScheduledIndexJob.description: Arguments accepted by an index scheduled job.

notify.description: Whether notification delivery runs after indexing succeeds.

push.description: Whether push delivery runs after indexing succeeds.

allOf.description: Refresh the index and optionally run delivery workflows.

oneOf.description: Refresh the index and optionally run delivery workflows.

coalesce.description: Whether missed slots are collapsed to the latest slot.

timezone.description: Explicit IANA time zone used for cron evaluation.

coalesce.description: Whether missed slots are collapsed to the latest slot.

oneOf.description: Validated job specification, absent only for a migrated legacy row.

legacy_command.description: Read-only command text retained from a legacy row for administrator review.

timezone.description: Explicit IANA time zone used for cron evaluation.

ScheduledTaskRunInfo.description: Persisted scheduled task run visible to administrators.

scheduled_for.description: Scheduled UTC Unix timestamp aligned to a minute.

task_name.description: Task name captured when the slot was queued.

worker_id.description: Worker identifier currently owning the run.

recent_runs.description: Recent durable task runs ordered from newest to oldest.

workers.description: Known worker heartbeats ordered from newest to oldest.

SchedulerWorkerInfo.description: Persisted scheduler worker heartbeat visible to administrators.

is_healthy.description: Whether the heartbeat is within the health threshold.

token.description: Raw token value returned only at creation time.

folder_id.description: Folder row identifier to mark as tracking.

notification_configured.description: Whether notification settings exist for the user.

weekly_articles_available.description: Number of weekly article ids currently available.

UserId.description: Auth user identifier stored as an ordinary SQLite integer.

UserResponse.description: User profile returned by auth endpoints.

is_admin.description: Whether the user has admin privileges.

WeeklyDatabaseUpdate.description: Weekly update summary for one database.

WeeklyJournalUpdate.description: Weekly update summary for one journal.
